specific_question: How did Information Security Manager, Jason Wong, facilitate secure supplier e-invoicing in April 2025?
answer: By April 2025, Jason Wong facilitated the migration of 89% of supplier invoices to encrypted emails, thus reducing manual paper handling by 62%.
